message.content: {"analysis":"Commands are being echoed but not executed - no prompt visible and no output. There's likely a still-running process in the foreground. Need to forcefully terminate it.","plan":"Send Ctrl+C forcefully and then try to get a clean prompt.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c\n","duration":2.0},{"keystrokes":"echo test\n","duration":2.0}]}
